steps.title: Set up unit conversion
steps.content:
Start with 90 km/h. Replace kilometers with meters using 1 km = 1000 m and hours with seconds using 1 h = 3600 s.
$$90 \frac{\text{km}}{\text{h}} \times \frac{1000 \text{ m}}{1 \text{ km}} \times \frac{1 \text{ h}}{3600 \text{ s}}$$

steps.title: Simplify to meters per second
steps.content:
Multiply numerators and denominators: $$ \frac{90 \times 1000}{3600} \frac{\text{m}}{\text{s}} = \frac{90000}{3600} \frac{\text{m}}{\text{s}} = 25 \frac{\text{m}}{\text{s}}.$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
